name: Home
title: Home
metaDescription: Welcome to Elliot Dickerson's professional portfolio and experimental playground featuring web projects, 3D experiences, and more.
metaKeywords: Vue.js, web development, software engineering, 3D web, portfolio
body: Welcome to my personal portfolio and experimental sandbox. This site serves as a platform for demonstrating modern web development techniques, testing innovative concepts, and showcasing interactive experiences.

As a Software Engineer at RM, I am dedicated to building robust, scalable applications and contributing to impactful technology solutions. <mark>This space reflects my ongoing journey of professional development and technical exploration.</mark>

name: About
title: About Me
metaDescription: Learn about Elliot Dickerson, a Software Engineer with a BSc (Hons) and 14 years of experience in full-stack web development.
metaKeywords: software engineer, PHP, Laravel, Symfony, Vue.js, React, full-stack, development experience
body: I am a passionate Software Engineer with a BSc (Hons) degree and over 14 years of professional experience in software architecture and full-stack web development.

My expertise lies primarily in PHP, alongside extensive knowledge of modern JavaScript ecosystems. I excel in database design with MySQL and maintain rigorous standards using version control systems like Git.

Throughout my career, I have successfully delivered projects utilizing a diverse array of frameworks and technologies, most notably:
  • PHP frameworks including Laravel and Symfony for robust backend architectures
  • Modern frontend libraries such as React, SolidJS, and Vue.js for dynamic, responsive user interfaces
In my current role as a Software Engineer at RM, I leverage this experience to solve complex challenges, drive technical innovation, and deliver high-quality software solutions.

name: Interests
title: My Interests
metaDescription: Discover Elliot's technical and creative pursuits, from 3D web development to music composition.
metaKeywords: coding, software engineering, music production, Three.js, webGL, creative coding
body: Beyond my professional commitments, I am deeply invested in continuous learning and exploring the frontiers of web technology. Personal coding projects offer an invaluable avenue for prototyping new ideas and experimenting with emerging tools.

Currently, I am fascinated by the intersection of web development and 3D computer graphics, utilizing libraries like Three.js to create immersive, performant experiences—such as the procedural cyberpunk city featured on this site.

Music is my other primary creative outlet. As a multi-instrumentalist with a focus on guitar, I compose and produce original music, blending technical precision with artistic expression. You can listen to some of my compositions on my YouTube channel.

name: Hidden
title: Hidden Archive
metaDescription: An archive of experimental mini-projects, interactive tools, and lightweight web games.
metaKeywords: experiments, web games, utilities, mini-projects, portfolio archive
body: You have discovered the hidden archive. This unlisted section serves as a repository for smaller experiments, utility tools, and lightweight browser games developed over time.

• Alcohol Checker - A utility tool calculating approximate sobriety timelines
  • Catch the Button - A DOM-manipulation reflex test tracking interaction speeds
  • Noughts and Crosses - A classic implementation featuring algorithmic bot logic
  • Ask Me - An automated conversational interface detailing my professional background
These projects, while simple, represent practical applications of various frontend development concepts.
